testcase.name: returnsFallbackWhenOpenAiRequestFails
testcase.system-out:
2026-04-28T20:33:47.671-05:00 WARN 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] c.e.a.service.OpenAiAnalysisService : OpenAI request failed.
org.springframework.web.client.ResourceAccessException: Connection timed out at org.springframework.web.client.RestTemplate.postForObject(RestTemplate.java:515) ~[spring-web-6.2.11.jar:6.2.11] at testcase.name: returnsFallbackWhenApiKeyIsMissing
testcase.system-out: 2026-04-28T20:33:47.725-05:00 WARN 27452 --- [ai-guest-feedback-analyzer] [ main] c.e.a.service.OpenAiAnalysisService : OpenAI API key is not configured.
